name: Elemental Wayfinder (Water)
description:
Pathfinder Society researchers recently created elemental wayfinders with the assistance of the Society's elemental allies. In addition to the effects of a , these wayfinders each grant the ability to cast a particular elemental spell once per day, and can assist Pathfinders in exploring areas associated with their element. Each has the trait associated with its element.

Activate 2 command

Frequency once per day

Effect The wayfinder can cast 4th-rank .

Additionally, you gain the constant effect of .
